/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/client.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/connection.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/crypto.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/dh.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/server.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/setup.cpp.o -o output/main  /opt/homebrew/Cellar/openssl@3/3.6.2/lib/libssl.dylib /opt/homebrew/Cellar/openssl@3/3.6.2/lib/libcrypto.dylib
